verbatim_quote: Like you may see Whimos going around and they look driverless. But you know there's still a lot of teleoperation and a lot of human in the loop of a lot of this driving.
gloss: [ANALOGY] Like you may see Whimos going around and they look driverless. But you know there's still a lot of teleoperation and a lot of human in the loop of a lot of this driving.
